name: OZOP ENERGY SOLUTIONS, INC.
business: The Company, through its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes renewable energy products, including solar panels and battery storage systems, and provides engineering and lighting control design services. It also offers modular energy distribution systems for electric vehicles and markets vehicle service contracts for electric vehicles. The Company's customers include architects, engineers, facility managers, electrical contractors, and EV owners.

exposures.sentence: The Company has developed a business plan for NeoVolt , a scalable battery storage solution that aims to relieve the stress on existing grid infrastructure by providing distributed energy storage.

The NeoVolt System comprises the design engineering, installation, and operational methodologies as well as the financial arbitrage of how we produce, capture and distribute electrical energy for the EV markets.

Ozop Plus markets vehicle service contracts (VSC s ) for electric vehicles (EV s) that offer consumers to be able to purchase additional months and miles above the manufacturer s warranty and to also bring added value to EV owners by utilizing our partnerships and strengths in the energy market to offer unique and innovative services.
OES operates in the renewable, electric vehicle ( EV ), energy storage and energy resiliency sectors.
The system is equipped with an array of sensors and control nodes, enabling precise light management and energy usage monitoring.
EV Insurance Company, Inc. ( EVCO ) was formed as a captive insurance company in the State of Delaware.

catalysts.event: Entered into agreement with Empire Auto Protect to white label VSCs
catalysts.sentence: On October 23, 2024, Ozop Capital Partners, Inc. entered into an agreement with Empire Auto Protect ( Empire ). Under the agreement, Empire will white label Royal Administration s Fully Charged VSC, to be marketed as Empire Plus. OZOP Plus will be ceded the battery premium portion of all of the Empire Plus VSC s contracted.

catalysts.event: Signed agreement with Leviton Manufacturing Co., Inc. to serve as field service technician
catalysts.sentence: On September 27, 2024, OED signed an agreement with Leviton Manufacturing Co, Inc., to serve as a field service technician for their advanced lighting control systems.

catalysts.event: Formed Automated Room Controls, Inc. subsidiary
catalysts.sentence: On June 11, 2024, the Company formed Automated Room Controls, Inc. ( ARC ) a Nevada corporation, as a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.

catalysts.event: Sold building and entered new lease effective September 1, 2025
catalysts.sentence: During the year ended December 31, 2025, the Company sold their building and entered into a new lease agreement effective September 1, 2025.
